title: Process Signals, Abort Trees, Listener Cleanup, and Graceful Shutdown · Contract Defense
summary: A release reviewer compares near-miss TypeScript decisions for process signals, abort trees, listener cleanup, and graceful shutdown and accepts only runnable changed-case evidence, compile diagnostics, explicit non-claims, and named browser, TypeScript, Node, network, filesystem, terminal, load, accessibility, and production transfer gates. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for composed abort-aware Node session lifecycle. Learners progress through prediction, expl…
objectives: Translate approved process signals into one root AbortController in the executable shell and define first and repeated signal behavior.
Compose session, command, timeout, and waiter signals while preserving reason and avoiding controller ownership confusion.
Use once or signal-bound listeners, remove handlers on completion, and prove no listener-count growth across commands.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz TypeScript team handles case 5101 during an offline mobile-library catalog migration. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove signal-to-abort translation, composed reasons, listener cleanup, ordered close, and state safety; no user-visible meaning may rely on color, cursor motion, or pointer input; then change one unknown JSON field, nested member, status, URL, or byte budget and re-run validation. Browser code uses pure bounded runtime models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, Node readline, host streams, signals, files, package installs, handle and load claims, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test abort before and during question, fetch, cache wait, prefetch, and save plus repeated signal, cleanup order, state, and output.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
